items.summary:
Pros:
*Game inspired by Lovecraftian horror
*Old units getting buffs
*Wide team building that can perform well
*No energy system to progress stages only at mats farming
*Pretty generous game if not trying to max all characters at release
*Monetization 

Cons:
*Some meta teams breaks the game
*For some units and weapons you want to go all in and no matter how generous game is its not enought to get all copies as f2p
*Monetization
